About Us

Rooted in India,
Reaching the World

A story of trust, quality and global ambition

Our Story

Built on Integrity,
Grown with Purpose

Based in Pune, Maharashtra, Zad Global Trade was founded with a single mission — to bring the finest Indian agricultural produce to international markets with full transparency and trust. We started with pomegranates and bananas, two crops where India leads the world in quality.

We work directly with certified farmers across Maharashtra, ensuring every shipment meets the strict standards of our buyers in UAE, Saudi Arabia, Malaysia, Bangladesh and Indonesia. No middlemen. No compromise.

Every box that leaves our warehouse carries our name and our promise — fresh, traceable, and delivered on time. That is the Zad standard.

Get In Touch →

What We Stand For

🌱

Quality First

Every piece of produce is graded, inspected and packed to international standards before it leaves our facility. We never compromise on quality.

🤝

Farmer Partnerships

We source directly from 200+ partner farms across Maharashtra, ensuring fair prices for farmers and full traceability for our buyers.

🌍

Global Trust

Our buyers across 5 nations trust us because we are consistent, transparent and reliable. In Trust We Trade is not just our tagline — it is how we operate every day.

See Our Process

From Farm to Your Shore

Zad Global Trade

Exporting India's premium agricultural heritage to the global stage with integrity, quality, and precision.
